text:
Once upon a time in a quiet village nestled between rolling hills and dense woods, there lived a little girl named Daisy.

Daisy lived happily ever after with her mom and dad. One vibrant summer morning, while her mother went to work pruning apples on the orchard, Daisy played nearby. She loved chasing butterflies and listening to birds sing.

One sunny afternoon, Daisy saw something odd. Up ahead in the distance was a peculiar tent crafted from vibrant colors. It looked like it could float! Curious, she approached it and peeked inside.

Inside was a wise old owl who had somehow adapted to living outdoors in a vibrant tent filled with flowers and twinkling stars. He was humming a tune that sounded sort of like a song she knew.

"Hello!" Daisy chirped. The owl hooted warmly.

"My name is Bloom," he announced. "And you!"

"I'm Daisy!"

"Why do you stay indoors?" Bloom asked thoughtfully.
